ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "roll" INTEGER /* Unique roll number for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program or major of the student */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Current semester of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roll")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of days for the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses (if any) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "roll" INTEGER /* Roll number of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "present_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the student was present */,
  "absent_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the student was absent */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Attendance percentage */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_roll FOREIGN KEY ("roll") REFERENCES students ("roll"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the faculty member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the faculty member belongs */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank or position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculty" (
  "course_faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-faculty relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_faculty_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (student or faculty member) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., attendance, course update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("roll")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., attendance, performance) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
